overview: KLYXO is a high-end cinematic movie portal by Alvee Noor Siyam — ultra-dark mobile-first design with gold branding, TMDB integration, voice search, backdrop hero carousel, and seamless scaling from mobile to desktop and Android TV.
features: Voice search via Web Speech API
Recently Watched section with progress bars
Movie & TV grids with golden hover glow
Mobile bottom nav + desktop fixed sidebar
Founder profile card with social links
TMDB trending, popular, now playing, top rated grids
